_comment: Copy this file to config.json in the same folder and fill in your Azure AI Search + FoundryIQ knowledge base details. config.json is gitignored so your real endpoint/tenant/subscription never gets committed.
_auth_comment: Set tenant_id when the search service lives in a DIFFERENT Azure AD tenant than your az CLI default (this prevents cross-tenant 401 'invalid_token' errors). The token is minted for this tenant. subscription_id is an optional fallback used only when tenant_id is empty; the two are mutually exclusive for 'az account get-access-token' so tenant_id wins. Leave both empty to use your current az context.
